name: unifi-netops
description: Single-plugin marketplace publishing unifi-netops: a network-engineer subagent + reference skill for UniFi networks operated with Debian/Ubuntu and Windows 11 hosts.

plugins.name: unifi-netops
plugins.description: Network-engineer subagent + reference skill for UniFi networks, Linux, and Windows 11 — fabric/STP/SFP triage, macvlan/bonding/VLAN review, Docker Swarm overlay/macvlan networking, and a flap/loop diagnostic playbook with four worked case studies.
